name: @paladinfi/eliza-plugin-trust
description: Pre-trade trust verification for ElizaOS evm agents — composed OFAC SDN + GoPlus + Etherscan + anomaly-heuristics risk gate via x402-paid PaladinFi API on Base. Natural-language LLM extraction; preview (free) and paid ($0.001 USDC/call) modes.
author: Mallesh @ Malcontent Games LLC (PaladinFi) <dev@paladinfi.com>

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test

PALADIN_TRUST_API_BASE.description: Base URL for PaladinFi API. Defaults to https://swap.paladinfi.com if unset.

PALADIN_TRUST_MODE.description: 'preview' (free; sample-fixture response) or 'paid' (x402-settled at $0.001 USDC/call on Base). Paid mode requires constructing the plugin via createPaladinTrustPlugin({ walletClientAccount }) — env-only paid mode is not supported in v0.1.0.

PALADIN_TRUST_DEFAULT_CHAIN_ID.description: EIP-155 chain id for trust-check requests when not derived from message context. PaladinFi v1 supports Base only (8453). Other EVMs return 400.

PALADIN_TRUST_ALLOW_INSECURE.description: PREVIEW MODE ONLY escape hatch — set to '1' or 'true' to permit non-HTTPS PALADIN_TRUST_API_BASE for testnet/dev. NO EFFECT in paid mode (paid mode is HTTPS-only and rejects non-HTTPS at boot regardless of this flag).
